mapper.select: SELECT P.PARTNER_ID AS VALUE , P.PARTNER_NM AS LABEL FROM store_partner_mst P LEFT JOIN store_mst S ON P.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE P.STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY P.SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT CATEGORY_ID AS VALUE , CATEGORY_NM AS LABEL FROM category_mst cm WHERE cm.PARENT_ID IS NULL AND STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY cm.SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT slm.LOCATION_ID VALUE , slm.LOCATION_NM LABEL FROM store_mst sm JOIN store_location_mst slm ON sm.STORE_ID = slm.STORE_ID WHERE sm.STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY slm.SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT 'ACTIVE' VALUE , 'ACTIVE' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FROZEN' VALUE , 'FROZEN' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT 'COMPLETE' VALUE , '완료' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'CANCEL' VALUE , '취소' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RETURN' VALUE , '반품' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RESERVATION' VALUE , '예약' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT 'VISIT' VALUE , '방문' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'DELIVERY' VALUE , '배달' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PACKING' VALUE , '포장' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RESERVATION' VALUE , '예약' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT 'CASH' VALUE , '현금' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'CARD' VALUE , '카드' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'POINT' VALUE , '포인트' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'GRP' VALUE , '복합' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT 'READY' VALUE , '준비' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'START' VALUE , '진행중' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'STOP' VALUE , '종료' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'CANCEL' VALUE , '취소' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT 'RESERVATION' VALUE , '예약' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'COMPLETE' VALUE , '완료' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'CANCEL' VALUE , '취소' LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RETURN' VALUE , '반품' LABEL FROM DUAL

SELECT DISTINCT M.SPECIAL_ID VALUE , M.SPECIAL_NM LABEL FROM special_mst M JOIN special_dtl D ON M.SPECIAL_ID = D.SPECIAL_ID JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE 1=1
AND M.START_DATE <= CONCAT(#{startDate} , ' 23:59:59') AND M.START_DATE >= CONCAT(#{startDate} , ' 00:00:00')
/* 카테고리 전체 데이터 */ SELECT * FROM category_mst cm WHERE 1=1 AND STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY 1
